case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. LINDA KENT et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAR-19-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KENT, LINDA
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
